nasb.text: The one who scatters has come up against you. Man the fortress, watch the road; Strengthen your back, summon all your strength.

esv.text: The scatterer has come up against you. Man the ramparts; watch the road; dress for battle; collect all your strength.

cnv.text: 尼尼微啊！ 那分散邦國的必上來攻擊你， 你要固守堡壘， 嚴防要道，束緊你的腰， 大大增強你的力量。

ccb.text: 尼尼微啊， 攻击者已经向你扑来。 你要进驻堡垒， 把守道路， 集中全力， 准备上阵！
